title: Set columns to fetch information from other boards

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d love it if monday Workforms would allow for columns to fetch information from other boards.

Superforms provides this option, but I’d rather see it on monday Workforms.

The idea is that you can select the board to select from, the column to select from, as well as remove duplicates and set conditional filtering.

Screenshot 2025-03-23 at 20.24.07595×364 21.3 KB
